name: Bristleback
description: It was a barkeep that got me into this mess. Yeah, I think I'll pay em a visit when this is done.

abilities.name: Prickly
abilities.description: Grants both outgoing damage amplification and debuff duration amplification against enemy units behind Bristleback.

abilities.name: Viscous Nasal Goo
abilities.description: Grants stack upon ability cast and does not rely on the impact.

abilities.name: Quill Spray
abilities.description: Sprays enemy units with quills dealing damage in an area of effect around Rigwarl. Deals additional bonus damage per current stack on the debuff-affected enemy unit.

abilities.name: Bristleback
abilities.description: If Rigwarl takes up to a certain amount of damage from the rear, he releases a Quill Spray of its corresponding level. While active, he is disarmed, applies a self movement speed slow, with his facing angle locked, and cannot turn.

abilities.name: Hairball
abilities.description: Applies Viscous Nasal Goo stacks of its corresponding level. Grants stack upon ability cast and does not rely on any impacts.

abilities.name: Warpath
abilities.description: Grants self flat bonus attack damage and bonus movement speed every time Rigwarl casts a spell. Does not bestow current stacks. However, the ability grants all created whenever gains one. Other ability components are fully functional with all illusion-mechanic notes apply.
